narrative:
Guyan Pct (precinct in Gallia County) has 259 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 37.5 percentage points.
